-- 1 of 24 --

Communication Styles
S 	Different Family cultures
S 	Explicit Communication – When someone is hurt or
confused you talk about it right away.
S 	Implicit Communication- Ignore tensions and focus on joy
of children and being together.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 24 --

Everyone gets hurt
S 	Wife- Feels that she is blamed and her husband isn’t able to
communicate the problem to his family.
S 	Husband- Feels caught in the middle between two women,
two family cultures and gets frozen.
S 	Mother in law- Looking for significance and love with out
skills to give to her daughter in law. As a result, her son feels
he has to choose between his mother and his wife.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 24 --

How to Fix it
Ron doesn’t know how to fix problem.
He goes for solution which hurts the least and avoids the pain.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 24 --

Use another relationship to 	Demenstrate
solution and problem
S 	Tony asks Ron to think of his relationship with his own son.
Then imagine what he would do in the future if he didn’t
like the son’s wife. This is a very direct way to help Ron
enter into the deeper level of the problem and to feel his
parents pain. He can also get in touch with his very loving
and energetic side which will not give up on his relationship
with his children.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 24 --

Listening
Enter the person you are listening to.
Feel the perspective of the other person.
Open Up.
Men- 	Don’t fix it, just hear and listen
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 24 --

Apology
Before listening, apologize.
Allow the apology to happen naturally.
Address each person individually from the heart.
Look into their eyes and feel them.
Don’t talk until you feel them.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 24 --

What happens inside Ron
through apology
He shares with his parents his desire for them to feel proud of him.
He wanted them to walk with him, be there, enjoy having the
children.
Ron had put the feelings of his wife to the side to have parents
experience with their granchild.
This allows Marie to express the trauma for her after the first baby
was born.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 24 --

Marie’s Sharing
She had wanted Ron to communicate to his parents how sick she was.
Ron had wanted his parents to have the joy of having the baby instead
of the illness Marie was dealing with.
This creates a level of resentment in Marie, she must put some blame
onto someone. Ron’s parents are easier to blame than Ron.
Marie couldn’t understand why Ron’s family didn’t like her or see the
good in her.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 24 --

Speak from feeling the
other person
Share- What mistake was.
Express- Desire to heal.
Explore- How future can look.
This moves the apology into the future of a better relationship.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 24 --

Expanding the Unit
Cloe had called the mother to get her to come in.
Saying, that her son was in trouble made her want to come and heal
the relationship.
Marie expresses her need to have her own bond with husband and
kids before she could open the door to the bigger family.
Marie expresses her desire to be loved and not disliked.
Mother in law- Admits to not being able to see the full situation of
Marie’s struggle.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 24 --

Next apology is to Marie
Tony explains to Ron how all wife wanted was to be loved.
Why go back to apologize to Marie in front of parents? Did you notice
Marie’s face and posture?
Ron needs to do this in front of his parents for himself, for Marie and for
parents to witness.
The past between Marie and Ron needs to be healed.
Ron hadn’t understood Marie’s need for private family time. He also sees
how he didn’t put her first until now.
She can give the most when she knows he loves her and puts her first.
Instead he had put doubts in her and hadn’t given her the love she needed.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 24 --

Marie accepts apology and
shares
She is afraid of it happening again.
Most difficult thing is maintaining their relationship.
Ron wants her to be proud of him. He wants her to continue to be proud of his
focus on their relationship and his love for her.
He hopes that she can say, It has gotten better. That he never takes her for granted
again.
Then she can really accept his apology.
Did she need him to vow this in front of the parents?
Why hasn’t Ron apologized directly to Mom? Tony led him to focus on Dad to
make less stress between the women.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 24 --

Father’s Perspective
He should have seen how Marie felt.
Mother’s Perspective
It is about them. Their struggle, their success.
Tony points out that they’ve struggles financially but succeeded
spiritually.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 24 --

Marie can now share
She expresses her love to all the family members. Notice how after
apology from Ron she can be happy and open and love his parents.
Tony asks for more clarity, questions, sharing so that everything can
be healed. He explains that strength comes from bad pain. He stresses
that they all know each others’ intent. We know who we are for each
other. Reality bridge, no one waits for the other to go to bridge first.
The fight is who can make it to the bridge first and make it right. That
is the focus to fix things first.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 24 --

Keys to Apology
S 	Speak from heart.
S 	Take responsibility for your choices.
S 	Honor your good intentions.
S 	Honor good intentions of others.
S 	Opens communication.
S 	Don’t make demands.
S 	Don’t ask for forgiveness.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

Results
Empowering Meaning.
New open communication.
Ability to see intent of self and other.
Race to repair relationship bridge first.

-- 18 of 24 --

Desire Vs. Reality
What happens when a person has a resource like a nursing degree and doesn’t want to
work in that field?
What happens when a family has to shift roles in order to move forward and be stable
and happy together?
A coach can ask:
What has to happen to do that?
Coach can explain the reality compared to others. This is where a reality check needs to
come in.
When life is hard, it is Winter and you need to align and work with it in a different way
than when it is Spring or Fall.
Eliminate external stress
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 19 of 24 --

Ask Family for Advice
Coach prepares family for their coaching of couple by asking:
What do you want to tell them?
What do you want to ask them?
This is when we need you to participate.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 20 of 24 --

Father’s perspective
Both need to work outside of home
How do both step up to share tasks at home
A job will happen may not be exactly what they expect
Coach can take a definition that one person has presented and
ask for more feedback from other family members, more
perspectives and suggestions of how to make this happen.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 24 --

Putting into perspective doing
what you don’t like to do
It’s important for the coach to point out how sometimes we need to
do what we don’t like, so that we are ready to grab what we do like.
Grandmother speaks to getting through the Great
Depression through working together with her husband.
She had her good times without money.
Mother adds to conversation of getting through hardship in life by
remembering her childhood.
“Job can be home away from home.”- Grandmother
“You manage it.” - Grandmother
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 22 of 24 --

Advice for Marie
Grandma - Get into nursing, they make good money. She can raise
herself up in that.
Father - Marie also has financial background and has been best
employee in past for father. She really excels in financial job.
Coach can then take what family advices and help couple see future
where they will do whatever it takes to make it and take care of each
other. Family gives confirmation of their belief in both Ron and
Marie.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
